title: Halliburton (HAL) Recruited by Energean for Greece Project
text: London-based Energean hires Halliburton (HAL) for carbon storage subsurface study in Greece.

title: The 'new FANG' trade will be in commodities amid market turmoil sparked by Russia's war in Ukraine, says wealth manager
text: Prices of oil, wheat, gold, and other commodities have soared since Russia's attack on Ukraine last month.

title: Energean Selects Halliburton for Carbon Storage Subsurface Study in Greece
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) today announced Energean, an independent E&P company focused on developing resources in the Mediterranean and the North Sea, awarded it a study to assess carbon storage potential of the Prinos basin in Greece. Halliburton carbon capture, utilization and storage (CCUS) experts will collaborate with Energean to evaluate the Prinos area's carbon dioxide (CO2) storage complex. The scope of work will include long-term plume modeling, char

title: Why are Halliburton, Schlumberger Pulling Back from Russia?
text: International sanctions have made it difficult for oilfield service providers Halliburton (HAL) and Schlumberger (SLB) to conduct operations in Russia.

title: Halliburton and Schlumberger, two of the world's largest oilfield service companies, are suspending operations in Russia
text: The two oil giants respectively announced in news releases on Friday that they were "immediately" suspending operations in Russia.

title: Halliburton winding down Russian operations
text: Halliburton Co. HAL, +0.42% said late Friday it has suspended future business in Russia as it complies with sanctions following the invasion of Ukraine. "Halliburton will prioritize safety and reliability as we wind down our remaining operations in Russia," the oilfield services company said in a statement.

title: Halliburton Announces Update on Russia Operations and Sanctions Compliance
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) today announced it immediately suspended future business in Russia as the Company complies with sanctions that prohibit transactions and work, including for certain state-owned Russian customers. Halliburton will prioritize safety and reliability as we wind down our remaining operations in Russia. Several weeks ago, the Company halted all shipments of specific sanctioned parts and products to Russia. Halliburton has no active joint ventu

title: Halliburton Labs Selects Three Companies for Clean Energy Accelerator
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Labs today announced its next group of companies selected to participate in its collaborative environment to advance and scale cleaner, affordable energy. title: Halliburton pivoting at $36. Should you buy it?
text: Investors are looking for companies that gain in times of war. Halliburton Company (NYSE:HAL) is among the entities whose shares gain under such circumstances.

title: Crude Slumps Despite Bullish EIA Data, Geopolitical Premium
text: With crude's ascent to $130, energy companies like Occidental Petroleum (OXY), Halliburton (HAL) and APA Corporation (APA) have seen solid gains this year.

title: Halliburton (HAL) Opens Saudi Chemical Reaction Facility
text: Halliburton Company (HAL) declares the opening of the first of its kind facility in Saudi Arabia called the Halliburton Chemical Reaction Plant.

title: Petrobel Selects Halliburton Landmark to Design and Deliver Cloud Solution for E&P Applications
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) today announced that Petrobel, a joint venture between ENI and the Egyptian General Petroleum Corporation, awarded a contract to deploy iEnergy® Stack, Halliburton's cloud solution that runs on-premise, to manage petrotechnical software applications. title: Halliburton's First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) will host a conference call on Tuesday, April 19, 2022, to discuss its first quarter 2022 financial results. The call will begin at 8:00 AM Central Time (9:00 AM Eastern Time). The Company will issue a press release regarding the first quarter 2022 earnings prior to the conference call. title: Halliburton Opens First Oilfield Specialty Chemical Manufacturing Reaction Facility in Saudi Arabia
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) today celebrated the opening of the Halliburton Chemical Reaction Plant – the first of its kind in Saudi Arabia to manufacture a broad range of chemicals for the entire oil and gas value chain as well as many other industries.
